'''''Marvel Super Special'' 27''': ''Return of the Jedi'' collects all four issues of the [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (1983)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']] series. It is a complete comic book adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].

It was misspelled as "''Super Special 26''" in the second issue of ''[[Marvel Age]]'', which also provided its release date in the ''Coming Attractions'' section.<ref name="MA2" />

==Publisher's summary==
''Easily the most eagerly-awaited movie adaptation ever done. Witness the battle to rescue '''Han Solo''' and the fantastic new confrontation between '''Luke Skywalker''' and '''Darth Vader''' in the most revelationary '''Star Wars''' saga of all!''<ref name="MA2" />

==Contents==
*[[Return of the Jedi 1|''Return of the Jedi'' 1]]
*[[Return of the Jedi 2|''Return of the Jedi'' 2]]
*[[Return of the Jedi 3|''Return of the Jedi'' 3]]
*[[Return of the Jedi 4|''Return of the Jedi'' 4]]
